name: iOS Accessibility Audit
description: Navigate through all 3 tabs (Models, Chat, Settings) and verify key elements have accessibility labels. Validates a11y coverage across the app.

steps.description: Verify app launched with tab bar containing all expected tabs.
Verify Models tab has accessible section headers.
Wait for chat view to render.
Verify Chat tab has accessible prompt field.
Verify Chat tab has accessible send button.
Wait for settings view to fully render.

Verify Settings tab is accessible and responsive. Note: iOS 26 Liquid Glass does not expose Form-internal elements (Toggles, Section headers) to XCUITest on physical device, so we verify the tab itself rather than Form internals.
Navigate back to Models tab to confirm full cycle.
Verify tab bar is still fully accessible after complete navigation cycle.
